title: Chapter 1 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 1 concepts!

questions.question: Dart is primarily used behind the scenes for which UI framework?
Every Dart application requires a `main()` function.
questions.explanation: Without a main function, the platform doesn't know where to start executing.

questions.question: How do you leave a single-line comment in Dart code?
Use the _____ function to output text to the console display.
questions.explanation: The print() function sends textual data to the debug console.
